ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident report */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the incident report */,
  "damage_to_property" INTEGER /* Total damage to property in dollars */,
  "fatal_incidents" INTEGER /* Number of fatal incidents */,
  "non_fatal_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of non-fatal injuries */,
  "grand_total" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents */,
  "total_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles involved in incidents */,
  "total_people_involved" INTEGER /* Total number of people involved in incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident detail */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident record */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., property damage, fatal incident) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle involved in the incident */,
  "num_injured" INTEGER /* Number of people injured in the incident */,
  "num_killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_gis" TEXT /* GIS coordinates of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the incident record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the report */,
  "total_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents */,
  "total_fatal_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of fatal incidents */,
  "total_non_fatal_injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of non-fatal injuries */,
  "total_property_damage" INTEGER /* Total damage to property in dollars */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the monthly report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* File format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES incidents ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_reports_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES incidents ("month")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident resolution */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_type" TEXT /* Type of resolution (e.g., fine, repair, investigation) */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken after the resolution */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident resolution (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_resolutions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident cause */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident record */,
  "cause_type" TEXT /* Type of cause (e.g., human error, equipment failure) */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_causes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_consequences" (
  "consequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident consequence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident record */,
  "consequence_type" TEXT /* Type of consequence (e.g., environmental damage, economic loss) */,
  "consequence_description" TEXT /* Description of the consequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_consequences_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_prevention_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevention measure */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident record */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of measure (e.g., safety protocol, employee training) */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_prevention_measures_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
